name: RVK Backend
postCreateCommand: cd backend && npm install && npx prisma migrate deploy
postStartCommand: sudo service postgresql start && sudo -u postgres psql -tc "SELECT 1 FROM pg_roles WHERE rolname='postgres'" | grep -q 1 || sudo -u postgres psql -c "ALTER USER postgres WITH PASSWORD 'postgres';" && sudo -u postgres psql -tc "SELECT 1 FROM pg_database WHERE datname='myapp'" | grep -q 1 || sudo -u postgres createdb myapp
